sections.title: Section 1-1 Purpose
sections.excerpt: The purpose of this ordinance is to promote health, safety, and general welfare by regulating land use and development.

sections.title: Section 1-2 Authority
sections.excerpt: This ordinance is adopted under state enabling legislation and local charter authority.

sections.title: Section 1-3 Definitions
sections.excerpt: Key terms used throughout the ordinance are defined in this section. Subsection 1-3.A Applicability {#section-1-3-a} Definitions apply to all articles unless otherwise stated.

articles.title: Districts and Uses
articles.summary: Zoning districts, permitted uses, and overlays.

sections.title: Section 2-1 Zoning Districts
sections.excerpt: The city is divided into zoning districts as shown on the official zoning map.

sections.title: Section 2-2 Permitted Uses
sections.excerpt: Permitted uses by district are listed in the use tables.

sections.title: Section 2-3 Special Use Permits
sections.excerpt: Special uses require review and approval by the zoning board.

articles.title: Dimensional Standards
articles.summary: Lot size, setbacks, height, and coverage requirements.

sections.title: Section 3-1 Lot Area
sections.excerpt: Minimum lot area standards apply to all principal uses.

sections.title: Section 3-2 Setbacks
sections.excerpt: Front, side, and rear setbacks must be met for new construction.

sections.title: Section 3-3 Building Height
sections.excerpt: Maximum building height is regulated by district.
